title: OT-2 PCR Prep 2/2: Master Mix Distribution and DNA Transfer
author: Opentrons (verified)
description: Part 2 of 2: Master Mix Distribution and DNA Transfer Links: * [Part 1: Master Mix Assembly](./pcr_prep_part_1) * [Part 2: Master Mix Distribution and DNA Transfer](./pcr_prep_part_2) This protocol allows your robot to distribute a master mix solution from well A1 of a trough to PCR strips. Robot will then transfer DNA samples to the master mix solution. --- You will need: * [12-channel reservoir](https://www.usascientific.com/12-channel-automation-reservoir.aspx) * [96-well PCR plate](https://www.bio-rad.com/en-us/sku/hsp9601-hard-shell-96-well-pcr-plates-low-profile-thin-wall-skirted-white-clear?ID=hsp9601)
steps_raw: Part 2 of 2: Master Mix Distribution and DNA Transfer Links: * [Part 1: Master Mix Assembly](./pcr_prep_part_1) * [Part 2: Master Mix Distribution and DNA Transfer](./pcr_prep_part_2) This protocol allows your robot to distribute a master mix solution from well A1 of a trough to PCR strips. Robot will then transfer DNA samples to the master mix solution. --- You will need: * [12-channel reservoir](https://www.usascientific.com/12-channel-automation-reservoir.aspx) * [96-well PCR plate](https://www.bio-rad.com/en-us/sku/hsp9601-hard-shell-96-well-pcr-plates-low-profile-thin-wall-skirted-white-clear?ID=hsp9601)
Input the number of samples you are processing.
Input the desired master mix and DNA volume in each well.
Upload your protocol into the OT App.
Set up your deck according to the deck map.
Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support article.
Robot will distribute master mix solution from trough to PCR strips in slot 2.
Robot will transfer DNA from PCR strips in slot 1 to those in slot 2.
